name: ProcessOut
description: AI-driven payment routing and analytics platform with real-time performance benchmarking across PSPs.

seo.title: ProcessOut — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: ProcessOut: AI-driven payment routing and analytics platform with real-time performance benchmarking across PSPs.

when_to_use: AI-driven PSP routing to maximize authorization rates
Real-time benchmarking of PSP performance across geographies
Diagnosing decline reasons and switching PSPs automatically

pros: Long-running product with real enterprise usage
Acquired by Checkout.com, giving deep resources
review.verdict: Mature orchestrator with genuine analytics depth; just know you are buying into the Checkout.com ecosystem now.
review.best_for: Enterprises comfortable standardising on Checkout.com who want integrated routing and analytics.
review.not_for: Teams wanting a fully PSP-neutral vendor with no parent-processor alignment.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
